summary: Tested guest mode, reporter login, admin mock OTP, and admin access restriction. All features working correctly. Backend: 10/11 tests passed (1 skipped due to real SMS mode). Frontend: All tests passed. Guest mode allows news feed access without login. Reporter login page shows 'Login as Reporter' with phone/OTP flow. Admin (9876543210 + OTP 123456) correctly redirected to /admin panel with settings icon visible. Non-admin users see 'Admin Access Required' when visiting /admin.

passed_tests: API health check - /api/ returns NewsPulse message
Guest mode - /api/news/feed accessible without auth
Guest mode - /api/news/categories accessible without auth (10 categories)
Guest mode - /api/news/category/national accessible without auth
Admin OTP - POST /api/auth/send-otp with mobile=9876543210 returns success
Admin OTP - POST /api/auth/verify-otp with mobile=9876543210 and otp=123456 returns is_admin=true
Admin OTP - Wrong OTP for admin (999999) rejected with 400
Reporter check - GET /api/reporter/check/0000000000 returns registered=false
Breaking news - GET /api/notifications/breaking returns articles array
Service worker - /sw.js accessible with 200 status
Guest mode UI - App loads directly to news feed (no login gate)
Guest mode UI - Header visible, NO admin/logout buttons for guest
Guest mode UI - Bottom nav shows Home, Swipe, Reporter, Videos, Saved
Guest mode UI - All 5 bottom nav tabs accessible
Reporter login - Clicking Reporter nav goes to /reporter-login for guests
Reporter login - Page shows 'Login as Reporter' with phone + OTP flow
Reporter login - Back to News button navigates to home
Admin login - Phone 9876543210 + OTP 123456 logs in as admin
Admin login - Admin redirected to /admin after successful login
Admin login - Admin phone stored in localStorage (userPhone=9876543210)
Admin login - Header shows admin button (gear icon) for admin
Admin login - Header shows logout button for logged-in user
Admin access - Non-admin sees 'Admin Access Required' at /admin
Admin access - 'Go to Home' link navigates to homepage
skipped_tests: Non-admin user OTP test - skipped (no debug OTP returned, real SMS mode)

critical_code_review_comments: Guest mode implementation is clean - no login gate, news feed accessible immediately
Admin phone (9876543210) hardcoded in both backend server.py and frontend App.js for isAdmin check
localStorage 'userPhone' used for admin detection on frontend - simple but effective
Service worker registration and breaking news polling set up correctly in utils/notifications.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest mode, reporter login flow, admin mock OTP (9876543210/123456), and admin access restriction all working. Breaking news endpoint returns scraped siasat.com articles from last 35 minutes. Service worker at /sw.js accessible. MOCKED: YouTube video feed still uses hardcoded data.

mocked_apis.YouTube video feed: Still hardcoded, not from real API
